default_summary.markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[To review and refine financial projections and board meeting strategy for growthx.ai.](https://fathom.video/share/bC1pTzRCuKraK1d9fBoxsquDs2_cDsLU?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Current burn rate is \~$300k/month, with flexibility to adjust for profitability](https://fathom.video/share/bC1pTzRCuKraK1d9fBoxsquDs2_cDsLU?tab=summary&timestamp=300.0)
  - [Aiming for 6-8x revenue growth in 2025, targeting $23M ARR](https://fathom.video/share/bC1pTzRCuKraK1d9fBoxsquDs2_cDsLU?tab=summary&timestamp=646.0)
  - [Planning to fundraise Series A later in 2025, aiming for 10% dilution](https://fathom.video/share/bC1pTzRCuKraK1d9fBoxsquDs2_cDsLU?tab=summary&timestamp=760.0)
  - [Focus on presenting strong growth efficiency metrics (e.g., magic number) to investors](https://fathom.video/share/bC1pTzRCuKraK1d9fBoxsquDs2_cDsLU?tab=summary&timestamp=1263.0)

## Topics

### Financial Model Refinement

  - [Current model shows $5.3M burn for 2025, which feels risky to CEO Daniel](https://fathom.video/share/bC1pTzRCuKraK1d9fBoxsquDs2_cDsLU?tab=summary&timestamp=673.0)
  - [Need to adjust gross margin calculations and remove certain layers (e.g., contractor vs. full-time employee breakdown)](https://fathom.video/share/bC1pTzRCuKraK1d9fBoxsquDs2_cDsLU?tab=summary&timestamp=875.0)
  - [Considering using "ARR per headcount cost" metric instead of "ARR per full-time employee"](https://fathom.video/share/bC1pTzRCuKraK1d9fBoxsquDs2_cDsLU?tab=summary&timestamp=927.0)
  - Aim to show increasing leverage over time: ARR/headcount cost ratio improving from \<1 to \>1

### Board Meeting Strategy

  - [Seeking balance between full transparency and curated storytelling](https://fathom.video/share/bC1pTzRCuKraK1d9fBoxsquDs2_cDsLU?tab=summary&timestamp=307.0)
  - [Focus on aggressive growth story (6-8x revenue growth) while acknowledging it's ambitious](https://fathom.video/share/bC1pTzRCuKraK1d9fBoxsquDs2_cDsLU?tab=summary&timestamp=646.0)
  - [Plan to explain the company is reserving the right to adjust growth pace if needed](https://fathom.video/share/bC1pTzRCuKraK1d9fBoxsquDs2_cDsLU?tab=summary&timestamp=660.0)
  - [Highlight strong magic number and growth efficiency metrics](https://fathom.video/share/bC1pTzRCuKraK1d9fBoxsquDs2_cDsLU?tab=summary&timestamp=1263.0)

### Fundraising Plans

  - [Targeting Series A raise in late 2025](https://fathom.video/share/bC1pTzRCuKraK1d9fBoxsquDs2_cDsLU?tab=summary&timestamp=743.0)
  - [Already having introductory calls with VCs (A16Z, Bessemer, etc.)](https://fathom.video/share/bC1pTzRCuKraK1d9fBoxsquDs2_cDsLU?tab=summary&timestamp=787.0)
  - [Aiming for 10% dilution, expecting \>20x multiple](https://fathom.video/share/bC1pTzRCuKraK1d9fBoxsquDs2_cDsLU?tab=summary&timestamp=760.0)
  - [Madrona (current investor) to play key role in introductions to top-tier VCs](https://fathom.video/share/bC1pTzRCuKraK1d9fBoxsquDs2_cDsLU?tab=summary&timestamp=787.0)

### Growth Initiatives

  - [Increasing capacity: aiming for 3-4 kickoffs per week](https://fathom.video/share/bC1pTzRCuKraK1d9fBoxsquDs2_cDsLU?tab=summary&timestamp=142.0)
  - [Exploring second revenue stream through services or software play](https://fathom.video/share/bC1pTzRCuKraK1d9fBoxsquDs2_cDsLU?tab=summary&timestamp=840.0)
  - [Potential expansion into marketing function tools (e.g., Galileo interest)](https://fathom.video/share/bC1pTzRCuKraK1d9fBoxsquDs2_cDsLU?tab=summary&timestamp=840.0)
  - [Planning to invest heavily in marketing](https://fathom.video/share/bC1pTzRCuKraK1d9fBoxsquDs2_cDsLU?tab=summary&timestamp=811.0)

### Operational Challenges

  - [Currently at 40 employees, with projections showing faster headcount growth](https://fathom.video/share/bC1pTzRCuKraK1d9fBoxsquDs2_cDsLU?tab=summary&timestamp=43.0)
  - [Balancing contractor vs. full-time employee mix](https://fathom.video/share/bC1pTzRCuKraK1d9fBoxsquDs2_cDsLU?tab=summary&timestamp=276.0)
  - [Need to improve headcount efficiency over time](https://fathom.video/share/bC1pTzRCuKraK1d9fBoxsquDs2_cDsLU?tab=summary&timestamp=1034.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Bridget to work with Ericsson to clean up spend lines in the financial model](https://fathom.video/share/bC1pTzRCuKraK1d9fBoxsquDs2_cDsLU?tab=summary&timestamp=875.0)
  - [Adjust gross margin calculations and create a cleaner view of key metrics](https://fathom.video/share/bC1pTzRCuKraK1d9fBoxsquDs2_cDsLU?tab=summary&timestamp=875.0)
  - [Finalize approach for presenting headcount efficiency (ARR per headcount cost)](https://fathom.video/share/bC1pTzRCuKraK1d9fBoxsquDs2_cDsLU?tab=summary&timestamp=927.0)
  - [Marcel to continue refining the board presentation narrative](https://fathom.video/share/bC1pTzRCuKraK1d9fBoxsquDs2_cDsLU?tab=summary&timestamp=142.0)
  - [Review January and February software spend to inform projections](https://fathom.video/share/bC1pTzRCuKraK1d9fBoxsquDs2_cDsLU?tab=summary&timestamp=1051.0)
  - [Continue exploratory calls with potential investors and partners](https://fathom.video/share/bC1pTzRCuKraK1d9fBoxsquDs2_cDsLU?tab=summary&timestamp=787.0)

action_items.description: Clean up spend lines w/ Ericsson. Hide certain rows. Calc gross margins. Add to fin model.
Create new metric for headcount efficiency (AR per headcount cost). Add to fin model.
Fix net profit calcs in fin model. Change from AR to revenue basis.
Pull Jan/Feb spend data for software & other expenses. Add to fin model.
